name: FlowCanvasWriter

ironRules.rule: BOLA check (flow.tenantId === ALS.tenantId) at ORDER 1 — before any state check or write. Cross-tenant canvas hijacking rejected immediately.
FLOW_IMMUTABLE guard (flow.status !== PUBLISHED) at ORDER 2 — after BOLA, before any write. FlowImmutableRejected emitted on published flow write.
Canvas write (storeDocument or updateDocument) at ORDER 3 — only if DRAFT state confirmed. No write attempt on PUBLISHED flows.
storeDocument(audit) at ORDER 4 BEFORE enqueue(FlowCanvasUpdated). DNA-8.
FlowImmutableRejected emitted on published flow write attempt. FlowCanvasUpdateFailed emitted on BOLA violation.

keywords: flow canvas writer BOLA FLOW_IMMUTABLE DRAFT PUBLISHED FlowCanvasUpdated FlowImmutableRejected two-guard state T617 visual flow engine
